# Docs

- [Voltus SDK Documentation](/docs): Build powerful integrations with the Voltus SDK.

- **Getting Started**
- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation): Install the Voltus SDK in your project using your preferred package manager.
- [Quick Start](/docs/getting-started/quickstart): Make your first API call with the Voltus SDK in under 5 minutes.
- [Project Structure](/docs/getting-started/project-structure): Recommended project structure for organizing your Voltus SDK integration.

- **Core Concepts**
- [Authentication](/docs/core-concepts/authentication): Learn how to authenticate with the Voltus API using API keys and OAuth tokens.
- [Configuration](/docs/core-concepts/configuration): Customize the Voltus SDK behavior with comprehensive configuration options.
- [Error Handling](/docs/core-concepts/error-handling): Gracefully handle errors and edge cases in your Voltus SDK integration.

- **API Reference**
- [Client Reference](/docs/api-reference/client): Complete API reference for the VoltusClient class and its methods.
- [REST Endpoints](/docs/api-reference/endpoints): Complete list of REST API endpoints available through the Voltus SDK.
- [Webhooks](/docs/api-reference/webhooks): Receive real-time notifications when events occur in your Voltus account.

- **Guides**
- [Data Fetching](/docs/guides/data-fetching): Patterns and best practices for fetching data efficiently with the Voltus SDK.
- [Pagination](/docs/guides/pagination): Navigate through large datasets with offset-based and cursor-based pagination.
- [Rate Limiting](/docs/guides/rate-limiting): Understand and work within the Voltus API rate limits.

- **Resources**
- [Changelog](/docs/changelog): What's new and improved in every release of the Voltus SDK.
- [FAQ](/docs/faq): Frequently asked questions about the Voltus SDK.
